summary: Every PDF download is now text-selectable, and the editor's score panel is honestly labelled as keyword match.

items.title: Text-selectable PDFs everywhere
items.description: Resumes downloaded from the dashboard's Applications view now produce real text-based PDFs that recruiters and applicant-tracking systems can search and parse, matching what the editor's other download buttons already produced.

items.title: Honest "Keyword Match Score" labelling
items.description: The editor's score panel and related dialogs are renamed to make clear the number measures keyword overlap with your pasted job description, not whether external ATS tools will accept your resume. The score and algorithm are unchanged.

summary: Landing page polish: cleaner section transitions and a calmer scroll experience.

items.title: Cleaner privacy section on the landing page
items.description: Fixed an issue where the last product card could overlap the privacy section as you scrolled past it. The transition between sections is now clean.

items.title: Steadier landing page entrance
items.description: Trust section cards now slide in from the sides without any vertical bounce, and the version label no longer flashes briefly during the first load.

summary: Patch release with stability and reliability improvements across the full 3.5.x cycle.

items.title: Stability and reliability improvements
items.description: This patch consolidates the improvements from the 3.5.x release cycle, ensuring everything works smoothly and consistently for all users.

summary: Pre-production polish: schema sync, API hardening, and faster landing page.

items.title: Snappier landing page
items.description: The home page hero now appears almost immediately on first visit instead of waiting for animations to load.

items.title: Stronger guardrails behind the scenes
items.description: Added automatic checks that prevent broken database references from ever reaching production, and brought the database fully in sync with the app.

items.title: Smoother sign-in and AI features
items.description: Tightened up the AI service connections and a few API endpoints so things stay reliable as the app grows.

summary: This update makes the app clearer and lighter to use, with simpler user messaging, a cleaner version bump, and reduced admin search spam.

items.title: Email search feels faster
items.description: The admin email search now waits for you to pause typing before it looks up users, so the page does less work and feels smoother while you search.

items.title: Plain-language update notes
items.description: The latest changelog entry is written in simple, user-friendly language so you can quickly understand what changed without reading technical details.

items.title: Version updated for this release
items.description: WiseResume has been bumped to the next app version to reflect the newest improvements and keep release tracking accurate.

summary: Ongoing security improvements and reliability fixes to keep WiseResume fast, safe, and dependable.

items.title: We're always working to keep your data safe
items.description: Behind the scenes we've added new layers of protection across WiseResume. Everything is quietly looked after so you can focus on your job search without worrying about the rest.

items.title: Your contact details stay private
items.description: We've made it harder for unwanted bots to collect your contact information from your public portfolio. Real visitors see everything normally — nothing changes for them.

items.title: Ongoing improvements and bug fixes
items.description: This update includes reliability fixes and behind-the-scenes improvements that make WiseResume faster and more dependable for everyone.

summary: Smarter AI error messages, cleaner PDF page breaks, and more reliable sign-in sessions during AI tasks.

items.title: AI errors are now clear and actionable
items.description: When AI isn't configured yet, you'll see a helpful message explaining exactly what's happening — with a direct 'Open Settings' button to fix it in one tap. No more confusing 'temporarily unavailable' messages.

items.title: PDF exports flow cleanly across pages
items.description: Resume sections no longer get cut off awkwardly in the middle when your resume spans more than one page. Each section now starts on the right page and always reads naturally.

items.title: AI keeps working even if your session refreshes
items.description: If your sign-in session expires in the background while you're using an AI feature, WiseResume now recovers automatically and finishes the task — without asking you to sign in again.
